header.description: Create, change and delete boards and cards

get.description: Get the data of a list

add.description: Add member to board using member ID

invite.description: Invite a new member to a board via email

remove.description: Remove member from board using member ID

getCheckItem.description: Get a specific checklist on a card

completedCheckItems.description: Get the completed checklist items on a card

updateCheckItem.description: Update an item in a checklist on a card

addLabel.description: Add a label to a card

removeLabel.description: Remove a label from a card

getCards.description: Get all the cards in a list

url.description: The URL of the attachment to add

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the attachment to add

name.description: The new name for the checklist item

fields.description: Fields to return. Either "all" or a comma-separated list of fields.

prefs_cardAging.description: Determines the type of card aging that should take place on the board if card aging is enabled

prefs_background.description: The ID of a custom background or one of: blue, orange, green, red, purple, pink, lime, sky, grey

prefs_comments.description: Who can comment on cards on this board

prefs_invitations.description: Determines what types of members can invite users to join

keepFromSource.description: If using idCardSource you can specify which properties to copy over. all or comma-separated list of: attachments, checklists, comments, due, labels, members, stickers.

defaultLabels.description: Whether to use the default set of labels

defaultLists.description: Whether to add the default set of lists to a board(To Do, Doing, Done).It is ignored if idBoardSource is provided

idOrganization.description: The ID or name of the team the board should belong to

prefs_permissionLevel.description: The permissions level of the board

powerUps.description: The Power-Ups that should be enabled on the new board

prefs_selfJoin.description: Whether users can join the boards themselves or whether they have to be invited

idBoardSource.description: The ID of a board to copy into the new board

prefs_voting.description: Who can vote on this board

pluginData.description: Whether to include pluginData on the card with the response

allowBillableGuest.description: Whether to allow organization admins to add multi-board guests onto a board

type.description: Determines the type of membership the user being added should have

fullName.description: The full name of the user to add as a member of the board. Must have a length of at least 1 and cannot begin nor end with a space.

due.description: A due date for the card

pos.description: The position of the new list. top, bottom, or a positive float.

idMembers.description: Comma-separated list of member IDs to add to the card

idLabels.description: Comma-separated list of label IDs to add to the card

urlSource.description: A source URL to attach to card

idCardSource.description: The ID of a card to copy into the new card

board.description: Whether to return the board object the card is on

board_fields.description: Fields to return. Either "all" or a comma-separated list: name, desc, descData, closed, idOrganization, pinned, url, prefs.

members.description: Whether to return member objects for members on the card

member_fields.description: Fields to return. Either "all" or a comma-separated list: avatarHash, fullName, initials, username.

stickers.description: Whether to include sticker models with the response

sticker_fields.description: Fields to return. Either "all" or a comma-separated list of sticker fields.

idChecklistSource.description: The ID of a source checklist to copy into the new one

checked.description: Whether the check item is already checked when created

checklistId.description: The ID of the checklist this item is in

idListSource.description: ID of the list to copy into the new list

id.description: The ID of the list to update

idOrganization.description: The ID of the team the board should be moved to

subscribed.description: Whether the acting user is subscribed to the list

idAttachmentCover.description: The ID of the image attachment the card should use as its cover, or null for none

idBoard.description: ID of a board the list should be moved to

due.description: A due date for the card

idLabels.description: Comma-separated list of label IDs to set on card

idList.description: The ID of the list the card should be in

idMembers.description: Comma-separated list of member IDs to set on card

pos.description: The position of the list. top, bottom, or a positive float.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

idMember.description: The ID of the member to remove from the board

type.description: Determines the type of membership the user being added should have

email.description: The ID of the board to update

listId.description: The ID of the list to create card in

commentId.description: The ID of the comment to delete

checklistId.description: The ID of the checklist to update

checkItemId.description: The ID of the checklist item to update

archive.description: Whether the list should be archived or unarchived

idBoard.description: The ID of the board the list should be created in
